reviews.name: 국****
reviews.content: 세일해서 구매했는데 양이 엄청 많아요! 락토프리 우유에 시리얼처럼 말아서 줬어요ㅎㅎ 알갱이가 큰 편이라 조금만 줘도 양이 많고 우유랑 주면 한 끼는 건너야할 것 같아요 아무맛도 안 나던데 강쥐는 짱 좋아해요ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I bought it on sale and there's so much! 😄 I mixed it with lactose-free milk like cereal. The pieces are pretty big so even a little goes a long way, and I think one serving would make my pup skip a meal 😂 It doesn't have much flavor to it, but my doggy absolutely loves it lol

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
▪️간식을 구입하는데 1순위는 알러지프리 그리고 저칼로리입니다. 그 모두 리즈를 충족시켜 주는 간식이에요.
▪️크런치 형태를 처음 먹어봐서, 처음에서 입에서 자꾸 쏙 빠져나오더니 조금씩 씹기 시작하저라구요.
▪️ 강아지들이 보통 사료도 그냥 삼키는 경향이 있어 어떻게 먹나 궁금했었는데 조금씩 씹어가며 먹는 모습이 신기했습니다^^
▪️갯수 부담도 없어  간식주기 편해요^^
reviews.content_en:
▪️When buying treats, my top priority is allergy-free and low-calorie. This treat checks all the boxes for Liz!
▪️Since it's the first time trying the crunchy form, at first it kept popping out of her mouth, but now she's started chewing it bit by bit.
▪️Most dogs tend to just swallow their regular kibble, so I was curious how she'd eat this, and it was amazing to see her chewing it little by little ^^
▪️There's no burden with the quantity either, so it's convenient to give as treats ^^

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 우리 강쥐는 이걸 애기때부터 꾸준히 먹어왔는데 진짜 너무 좋아하고 바삭바삭해서 씹는 소리가 예술입니다 헤비하지 않아 부담 없이 주기 좋고 교육 시킬땨도 이 간식을 자주 이용하는데 너무 맛있어서 그른가 너무 잘먹어요
reviews.content_en: My pup has been eating this since he was a baby and he absolutely loves it! The crackling sound when he chews is just art—it's so satisfying 🎵 It's not heavy so it's great to give without worry, and I use this treat a lot during training. He eats it so well because it tastes that good!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
1kg 포메~ 
한알을 1분30초 ~2분20초 정도 드시네욤^^
생각보다 꽤 오래먹고 ~ 먹는 asmr 바사삭 하네요
애기가 잘먹어요~ 까까 디자인이 왜케 이뻐요♡
reviews.content_en:
1kg Pomeranian~ 🐕
Each piece takes about 1 min 30 sec to 2 min 20 sec to eat ^^
It lasts way longer than expected~ the eating ASMR is so crispy and crunchy 🤤
My baby eats it so well~ Why is the packaging design so cute? ♡

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
오프라인에사도 종종 구매하는 제품입니디.
뻥튀기 강아지용느낌 가볍고 강아지가 아주 좋아하지는 않지만 우유에 주면 금방 먹어요! 
이번에 핑크 패키지랑 같이 저렴하게 구입했네요 3개에 3천원 꼴이라 완전 좋아요!
reviews.content_en:
I buy this product offline pretty often.
It's light like popcorn for dogs, and my pup doesn't absolutely love it by itself, but he eats it right up when I mix it with milk! This time I got the pink package together at a great price—3 pieces for about 3,000 won, which is amazing!

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 아그작아그작 잘 먹네요. 부담없이 주기 좋은데 행사상품이여서인지 유통기한 5개월 남은건 좀 아쉽네요.
reviews.content_en: He munches on it well. It's easy to give without worry, but since it's a promotional item, it's a bit disappointing that it only has 5 months of shelf life left.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
일반 간식은 많이먹으면 맘마도 안먹지만
이 제품은 가볍게 칭찬간식이나 심심해할때 양껏 급여해주면 아이도 만족하고 잘 먹어요~
다만 흰색 동그란건 거의 무맛에 가까운지 기호가 좋은편은 아니예요ㅠ 아무튼 잘 먹는편이예요👍
reviews.content_en: With regular treats, my pup won't eat his meals if he has too many, but with this product I can give him plenty as a praise treat or when he's bored, and he's satisfied and eats it well~ However, the white round ones barely have any flavor, so he's not too interested in those 😅 But overall he eats them well 👍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 겨울에 패딩입히기전까진 아주 든든하게 잘입힐꺼 같아요 색감과 소재가 너무 마음에 들어요
reviews.content_en: Before I put the padding jacket on him for winter, I think he'll wear this really nicely. I'm so happy with the color and material!

reviews.name: R****
reviews.content:
배송 엄청빠릅니다
포장 꼼꼼하게
해서 잘 받았어요 
양도 많아서 오래 잘 사용 할 듯 합니다
reviews.content_en:
Super fast shipping 📦
Packaging was really careful,
so I received it in great condition.
There's also a good amount, so I think I'll be using it for a long time 😊

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 환장하고 먹어요 더 달라고 긁고 주변에 어슬렁 거리면서 요구하네요 대체 무슨 맛이길래 이럴까요 제가 먹어볼 수도 없고 아무튼 잘 먹으니 뿌듯합니다!!
reviews.content_en: He goes crazy for it! He scratches asking for more and hangs around begging for it 😂 What flavor could it possibly be? I can't even taste it myself, but anyway he eats it so well and I'm so proud! 🥰!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 패키지도 귀엽고 양도 적당해서 잘 구매한 것 같아요 가격도 저렴해서 종종 구매하려구요
reviews.content_en: The packaging is cute and the portion size is just right - I feel like I made a good purchase! The price is affordable too, so I'm planning to buy it regularly.

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
강아지가잘먹어요ㅎㅎ재즈문했어요
노즈워크할때 딱 좋아요~  작아서좋아요ㅎ
심지어 색도 너무이뻐요ㅜ
reviews.content_en: My puppy eats it so well hehe Jazz loved it! It's perfect for nosework~ And it's nice that it's small hehe The color is also so pretty ㅜ

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
바삭바삭하게 맛있게 먹네요♡
살도 많이 안 찌고 제가 먹어봤는데도(?) 먹을만 하네요ㅎㅎ990원에 저렴하게 잘 샀어요. 잘 먹이겠습니다.
reviews.content_en: She eats it all up nice and crispy ♡ It doesn't add much weight, and I even tried it myself(?) and it's tasty lol We got a great deal at 990 won. I'll keep feeding it to her.

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 가격이 싸서 궁금해서 구매해봤는데 우유조아 강아지라 그런지 요거트볼 좋아하네요 양도 많아서 한봉지에 여러번 나눠줄 수 있어서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I was curious because the price was so cheap, so I bought it, and since my pup loves milk, she really likes these yogurt balls! The quantity is generous too, so I can divide one pack into multiple servings which is great.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 꺄아아ㅏㅇ 넘 귀여워오 사람처럼 시리얼을 먹을수있다니 ㅎㅎ 펫밀크도 사서 같이 줘봐야겟어용 첨이라 생소해서 먹을진 모루겟지만 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Awww so cute!! Who knew dogs could eat cereal just like people hehe I should buy pet milk too and give them together. Since it's my first time, I'm not sure if she'll eat it hehe

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 오리지널 크런치팝을 바삭바삭 맛있게 너무 잘먹어서 요거코코도 같이 구매해봅니다~ 바잇미패키지 진짜 다 넘 귀여워용ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: She eats the original Crunch Pop so crispy and deliciously that I'm buying Yogurt Cocoa too~ The BITE ME packaging is seriously all so adorable lololol

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 강아지가 넘넘 좋아하고 털 빗길 때나 산책 갈 때 부담없이 챙겨서 주기 딱 좋아요! 칼로리 걱정도 별로 없어서 강아지 심심해 보일 때 몇개 던져주면 넘 좋아해요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 담에 또 행사하면 무조건 재구매 할려구용ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My dog absolutely loves it and it's perfect for giving her a treat whenever - during brushing or before a walk without any guilt! Since there's not much to worry about calorie-wise, I just toss a few whenever she looks bored and she goes crazy for them lololol We'll definitely repurchase if there's a sale next time hehe

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
이전에 먹이고 비슷한거 사뽰는데 이것만큼 맛나게 먹지 않아
다시 구매했습니다ㅎㅎ
칼로리 부담도 없고 신나게 먹어서 좋아요~
reviews.content_en: I gave her something similar before and it wasn't nearly as tasty as this, so I reordered hehe No calorie worries and she eats it so enthusiastically - love it~

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 알러지때문에 간식도  아무거나 못 먹는데 다행히 이건  괜찮네요. 바삭바삭하고  맛있나봐요. 엄청 좋아해요.
reviews.content_en: Because of allergies, she can't eat just any treats, but thankfully these are fine. They're crispy and tasty apparently. She absolutely loves them.

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
크런치팝 넘 좋아요!! 진짜 ㅎ강아지가
너무잘먹고 노즈워크할때도
아주좋습니다  ㅎㅎ색도 이뻐요 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: I love Crunch Pop so much!! Really hehe My pup eats it so well and it's also great for nosework hehe The color is pretty too hehe

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 알러지 있는 우리아이가 젤 많이 먹는 간식이 바잇미 시리얼이예요 칼로리 부담도 없어서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: BITE ME cereal is the snack our allergic child eats the most. I love that there's no calorie burden either!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
바잇미  간식은 우리 세아이들  다  잘먹어요
요번것도  너무 좋아하네요
양도  많앙ᆢㄷ
reviews.content_en: All three of our kids eat BITE ME snacks well. They're loving this one too! And the portion size is generous 😊

reviews.name: 선****
reviews.content: 아삭아삭 너무 잘먹어요 칼로리부담도 없어서 추천합니드
reviews.content_en: It's so crispy and they eat it really well! No calorie worries, so I recommend it 👍

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content: 유치원 교육 간식으로 너무 좋아요 언심하고 줄수있고 칼로리 걱정이 필요없어서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Perfect for kindergarten snack time! I can give it with peace of mind and there's no need to worry about calories 😊

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
아침 식사대용?겸 우유줄때 같이 섞어서 주고있어요~!
잘먹어서 뿌듯하네요☺️
우유 없이도 잘먹고 우유,요거트에도 주고 특별간식으로 주니
많이 좋아해요.
reviews.content_en: I give it mixed with milk as a breakfast alternative~! It's rewarding to see them eat it well ☺️ They eat it well even without milk, and I also give it with milk and yogurt as special treats, and they love it so much.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 바삭바삭해서 애들이 엄청 좋아해요!! 우유에 넣어서 주니 엄청 잘먹어용😆
reviews.content_en: It's so crispy that the kids absolutely love it!! When I put it in milk they eat it so well 😆

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 배변훈련 보상용으로 주기 딱좋은 간식^^ 씹는소리도 너무 좋아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Perfect snack for potty training rewards ^^ The crunching sound is so satisfying too haha

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 이것도 N년째 구매!!! 이번에 헬로키티 에디션 너무귀여워요>.<
reviews.content_en: I've been buying this for N years now!!! The Hello Kitty edition this time is so cute >.<

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 펫 시리얼은 처음 구매해봅니당 원래는 그냥 먹이려다가 우유도 사서 먹여보려구요!ㅎㅎ 포장이 너무 귀여워용
reviews.content_en: This is my first time buying pet cereal! I was just going to feed it as-is, but I'm thinking of getting milk too to try it that way! haha The packaging is so cute 💕

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
매번 쟁겨두는 간식이예요
우유는 유통기한 전에 다 먹이면 되겠어요
reviews.content_en: This is a snack I always keep stocked. Just make sure to finish the milk before the expiration date!

reviews.name: 둥****
reviews.content:
다이어트 간식인데 맛도 좋은지 둥이가 잘 먹어요.
바삭바삭해서 먹을때 너무 귀여워요.
reviews.content_en: It's a diet treat, and my twins eat it well because it tastes good too. The crunchiness is so cute when they eat it.

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 아직 먹여보진 않았는데 포장 넘 귀여워용 ㅠㅠ 제가 먹구 시프네요 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Haven't tried feeding it yet, but the packaging is so adorable ㅠㅠ I kinda want to eat it myself lol

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
제품은 좋은데..
우유만 홀라당 먹고 안먹네요 ㅠㅠ..
전에 분홍색 버전도 잘먹었는디 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: The product is good, but... he only eats the milk part and won't touch the rest ㅠㅠ He ate the pink version well before though ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
노즈워크나산책나가서도
먹기좋은간식입니다  ㅎㅎ건강한간식이라서
더 더 좋아요~~! ㅎ믿고먹이는 바잇미
바삭함이좋아서 아이도 좋아하는거같애요
reviews.content_en: It's a great snack to bring along for nose work or walks ㅎㅎ Since it's a healthy treat, I love it even more~~! ㅎ I trust and feed BITE ME. My pup seems to like it because of the crunchiness!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 저칼로리라 다이어트중인 강아지한테 좋아요. 여러개 줘도 살찔걱정 안해도되고 좋아요. 강아지 우유랑 같이 주면 잘먹을것같아요.
reviews.content_en: It's low-calorie, so it's great for dogs on a diet. You can give multiple treats without worrying about weight gain, which is nice. I think he'll eat it well if you give it with dog milk too.

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
크런치팝 분홍색 잘 먹어서 시켜봤는데, 요것도 잘 먹네요

부스러기 없어서 노즈워크하거나 산책갈때 가지고 다니기도 좋아요
reviews.content_en: He ate the pink Crunch Pop well, so I ordered this one too, and he eats it just as well. There are no crumbs, so it's convenient to carry along for nose work or walks.

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 할인할때 사봤는데 강아지가 잘먹어요. 냄새 맡아보니 고소한 곡물냄새가 나요. 사람이 먹는 시리얼처럼 생겼는데 귀엽네요.
reviews.content_en: I bought it on sale and my dog eats it well. It smells nutty and grainy. It looks like human cereal, which is cute.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
크런치팝 가격에 우유가 덤인거 같은 가격이예요
우유도 잘 먹구 크런치팝은 아가때부터 늘 주던 간식이라
쟁여 놓아요~
reviews.content_en: The milk seems like a bonus with the Crunch Pop price. He eats the milk well, and since I've been giving Crunch Pop treats since he was little, I always keep them stocked~

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 바삭한 소리가 나서 먹일때 참 듣기 좋아요! ㅎㅎㅎ 무엇보다 입짧은 저희 댕댕이 인데 잘 먹어줘서 좋습니다~ ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The crunchy sound when eating is so nice to listen to! ㅎㅎㅎ Most importantly, my picky eater pup eats it well~ ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
항상 쟁여나요 
미용할대랑 
등등 노즈워크용으로 조음
몇년내내 주니 안조아함 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I always keep them stocked. They're great for grooming appointments and all that, and for nose work activities. But after giving it for a few years straight, he's over it lol

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
재구매에요~ 살안찌고 알러지 걱정없는 간식으로 샀어요
행사해서 쟁였습니다! 넘 조아요
reviews.content_en: This is a repurchase! 🛒 I got it as a worry-free snack that won't make my pup gain weight and has no allergy concerns. It was on sale so I grabbed it! Love it so much~

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 크런치팝 부담없이 먹을수있는 간식이에여
reviews.content_en: Crunch Pop is such a guilt-free treat for my pet 😋

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 바사삭 씹어먹는 소리가 너무 귀여워요ㅋㅋ 우유랑 같이줘도 너무 잘 먹어요!!
reviews.content_en: The crunchy munching sound is so adorable lol 🐕 My pup eats it really well even when I mix it with milk!!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
유치원 교육용간식으로 구매했어요
우유에 말아서 줘도 너무 잘 먹네요 ~!!
reviews.content_en: I bought it as an educational snack for kindergarten. My pet eats it so well even when I soak it in milk ~!!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 애기가 진짜 잘먹어서 N년째 먹고잇어요! 베이글쿠키 다시 출시해주세요ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: My baby eats it so well that we've been having it for years now! 😭 Please bring back the Bagel Cookie!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
항상 쟁겨놓는 제품이예요
가벼운 간식으로 부담없이 주기 좋아요
reviews.content_en: This is always something I keep stocked! It's a light snack that I can give without any worries 🐾

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
매번 쟁겨두는 간식이예요
자극적이지 않은거 같고 칼로리도 낮다고 해서 부담없이 
주고 있어요
reviews.content_en: This is a snack I always keep on hand. It doesn't seem overstimulating and since it's low calorie, I give it without any concerns 💕

reviews.name: 가****
reviews.content: 사람이 먹고 싶을만큼 맛있게 생겼어요 아이도 잘 먹고 칼로리도 부담없어서 틈틈히 주고 있어요
reviews.content_en: It looks so delicious that even I want to eat it! My pet eats it well and the calories are nothing to worry about, so I give it here and there 😄

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 시리얼 사는김에 우유랑 같이 할인되어서 샀어요. 시리얼은 저칼로리라 자주 사는 간식이에요.
reviews.content_en: I bought it on discount along with the cereal and milk. The cereal is low calorie so it's a snack I buy frequently 🥣

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
아직 먹여보진 않았지만 잘 먹을 것 같아요! 
배송도 빠르고 선물용으로 주기에도 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Haven't tried it yet but I think my pet will love it! 🐶 Shipping was fast and it's great to give as a gift too 🎁
